news.summary: E7386, a new compound, has had its abstract published after being co-developed through collaborative research by Eisai and PRISM BioLab, Co. Ltd. The abstract release occurred on May 22, 2025. PRISM, a prominent biotechnology company, specializes in creating small molecule inhibitors of protein-protein interactions. This collaboration signifies a milestone in drug discovery, showcasing the success of joint efforts in the field.
news.headline: Eisai to showcase E7386, co-developed with PRISM BioLab, at ASCO meeting, highlighting abstract of collaborative research.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Shanghai, CARsgen Therapeutics Holdings Limited (Stock Code: 2171.HK), a firm specializing in advanced CAR T-cell therapies, disclosed the abstract of findings from the Phase II clinical trial confirming the efficacy of satricabtagene autoleucel. The trial showcased promising results with significant patient response rates. This development marks a pivotal step forward in the field of CAR T-cell therapy, with the potential to provide a breakthrough treatment for a broad range of cancers. The company's stock code, 2171.HK, underscores the growing interest and investment in this innovative approach to cancer treatment.
news.headline: CARsgen's Satri-cel Phase II trial abstract released on ASCO website; promising results. Stock Code: 2171.HK.

news.summary: In Taipei on May 22, 2025, GNTbm (stock code: 7427, Taiwan) revealed promising preclinical findings about GNTbm-38, a cutting-edge epigenetic immune booster designed for cancer immunotherapy. The data on GNTbm-38 was showcased through posters during the 2025 American Association of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting.
news.headline: GNTbm presented preclinical data on GNTbm-38, an epigenetic immune activator, at 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting. Stock code: 7427.

JAPAN'S NIKKEI AVERAGE FUTURES UP 0.1% IN EARLY TRADE

news.summary: On Thursday, the market saw a slight recovery, with Palantir and Tesla experiencing gains. However, this bounce was short-lived. In a significant development, the Supreme Court made a decision to protect the Federal Reserve from any influence by former President Trump. As a result of these events, Dow Jones futures are now experiencing a fall after the initial market rebound. This news was originally reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Dow futures drop after market gains stall. Supreme Court protects Federal Reserve from Trump. Palantir, Tesla rise.
THE U.S. ENERGY DEPARTMENT HAS DESIGNATED METALLURGICAL (STEELMAKING) COAL AS A CRITICAL MATERIAL UNDER A TRUMP EXECUTIVE ORDER TO STRENGTHEN INDUSTRIAL SUPPLY CHAINS.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, MindHYVE.ai™, a leading company specializing in agentic AI and swarm-intelligent systems based in the United States, made a significant advancement in improving clinical diagnostics across Pakistan. A formal Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) was established between MindHYVE.ai™ and Islamabad Diagnostic Centre. This partnership aims to enhance diagnostic services on a national scale in Pakistan, potentially impacting a large number of people.
news.headline: MindHYVE.ai™ partners with Islamabad Diagnostic Centre to introduce AGI-powered diagnostic intelligence in Pakistan.

news.summary: The National Association for Veterans Rights (NAVR) has praised the State of Alabama for passing Senate Bill 206 (SB 206), a significant piece of legislation that provides essential protections for Veterans navigating federal disability benefits. Governor Kay Ivey signed the bill into law, underscoring Alabama's dedication to supporting its former service members. SB 206 solidifies safeguards for Veterans in need of assistance with their benefits. This move aligns Alabama with other states that have taken similar steps to safeguard Veterans' rights.
news.headline: NAVR applauds Alabama for enacting SB 206 to protect veterans from predatory practices, Governor Kay Ivey signed the bill into law.

OIL PRICES ARE ON TRACK FOR THEIR FIRST WEEKLY DECLINE IN THREE WEEKS AS OPEC+ CONSIDERS A SIGNIFICANT OUTPUT INCREASE OF 411,000 BARRELS PER DAY FOR JULY. WEST TEXAS INTERMEDIATE (WTI) SLIPPED TOWARD $60 A BARREL, WHILE BRENT CLOSED JUST ABOVE $64, WITH NO FIRM AGREEMENT YET

news.summary: AI-Media, a prominent provider of live captioning and translation services, has recently formed a significant partnership with Lightning International. The collaboration aims to localize content for FAST platforms.
news.headline: AI-Media & Lightning International partner to make FAST Channels accessible, providing live captioning & translation solutions.

JAPAN APRIL CPI EX-FRESH FOOD, ENERGY RISES 3.0% Y/Y

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.5%, with a total of 10 million people currently out of work. This represents an increase of 2% from the previous year. Additionally, the report highlighted that the GDP growth rate has slowed to 2.3% in the last quarter, down from 3.5% in the previous quarter. Experts predict that these economic challenges may persist in the coming months, leading to further job losses and financial strain on the population. The government has pledged to implement measures to stimulate the economy and create more job opportunities in the near future.
news.headline: Reeflex Solutions Inc. finishes qualifying transaction successfully.

news.summary: In a recent update, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates for the month of October. The national unemployment rate rose to 6.9%, marking an increase of 0.5 percentage points compared to the previous month. This resulted in a total of 11.1 million individuals being unemployed. Additionally, the number of long-term unemployed (those jobless for 27 weeks or more) saw a slight increase to 3.6 million. The employment-population ratio decreased to 57.4%, reflecting the ongoing challenges in the job market. Job losses were observed in various sectors including retail, hospitality, and healthcare, highlighting the widespread impact of the current economic conditions. Overall, these numbers indicate the continued struggle faced by many individuals and industries as they navigate the effects of the pandemic on the workforce.
news.headline: Reeflex Solutions Inc. completes qualifying transaction, marking a key milestone for the company.

news.summary: An Australian city has reported a significant rise in COVID-19 cases, with 345 new infections confirmed in the past 24 hours. This marks a sharp increase from the previous day's count of 210 cases. The total number of active cases in the city has now reached 2,560, putting a strain on the local healthcare system. Authorities have implemented stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and restrictions on gatherings. Residents are urged to follow these guidelines to help contain the outbreak.
news.headline: U.S. stocks weaken at market close. Visit Bloomberg for detailed market wrap.

news.summary: This week, Bitcoin reached record highs as trading volume on futures and spot exchanges saw a substantial increase, demonstrating strong investor interest in the cryptocurrency.
news.headline: Bitcoin's price surged to record highs as trading volume on exchanges increased, indicating strong investor interest.

news.summary: On May 21, 2025, in a virtual Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders held in Vancouver, British Columbia, Imperial Metals Corporation disclosed that the individuals nominated in the management information circular dated April 4, 2025, have been successfully chosen as directors of the Company. The Meeting was held in adherence to Toronto Stock Exchange regulations, and the company's stock symbol is TSX:III.
news.headline: Imperial Metals Corp announces directors elected at virtual meeting. Meeting held on May 21, 2025. TSX:III.

news.summary: In Calgary, AB on May 22, 2025, Frontera Energy Corporation (TSX: FEC) revealed key figures from its annual & special meeting of shareholders for the year 2025. The session featured the election of directors, with all candidates receiving approval. Investors also voted on executive compensation, with the proposed plan gaining significant support. Additionally, the appointment of the auditor was ratified, ensuring compliance and financial oversight. The Meeting showcased a high level of shareholder engagement, reflecting a strong outlook for Frontera's operations moving forward.
news.headline: Frontera Energy Corp. (TSX: FEC) reveals results from 2025 annual & special meeting of shareholders in Calgary.

news.summary: A poster presentation will showcase the progress of the worldwide Phase 3 ASP-1929-381 study at ASCO 2025. The study has seen active patient enrollment globally, with Taiwan currently enrolling patients after the United States. Japan is anticipated to join the study soon as part of the global study launch. This update was shared at a conference in San Diego on May 22, 2025.
news.headline: Rakuten Medical expands global Phase 3 ASP-1929-381 trial to Taiwan after U.S., with Japan to follow. Presentation at ASCO 2025.

news.summary: A prominent cryptocurrency game, Ember Sword, has faced its downfall, joining the ranks of other failed projects in the crypto gaming market. The game managed to amass a significant amount through the sales of NFT land, with the exact numbers reaching a substantial figure.
news.headline: Ember Sword, the latest crypto game shutdown, amassed significant funds through NFT land sales amid the rising trend.

news.summary: A study conducted by Northeast Delta Human Services Authority in Monroe, Louisiana, will be featured in the upcoming issue of BMC Primary Care Journal on May 22, 2025. Titled "The Assessment of Mental and Physical Health Outcomes Over Time in An Integrated Care Setting," the research paper delivers positive results regarding the long-term health outcomes of individuals receiving integrated care. This significant research reveals promising insights into the effectiveness of integrated care, highlighting the importance of mental and physical health integration.
news.headline: NEDHSA research on mental and physical health outcomes to be published in BMC Primary Care Journal, showcasing positive results.

news.summary: The U.S. economy in 2025 is facing several challenges that could hinder growth and stability. These include Moody's downgrading the U.S. long-term credit rating from Aaa to Aa1, resulting in higher borrowing costs for consumers and businesses. This downgrade could slow spending and investment. Another issue is weakening housing demand due to higher mortgage rates. Additionally, tariffs are impacting corporate earnings, even though some have been reduced. Dr. Torsten Slok identified 10 key downside risks, highlighting the potential threats to economic stability. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Growing risks to America's economy in 2025 from Moody's downgrade, weakening housing demand, and tariffs on corporate earnings.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Vancouver, Swiss Water Decaffeinated Coffee Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders. The company (TSX: SWP), recognized for its specialty coffee and green coffee decaffeination services, shared the voting results from the meeting conducted on the same day.
news.headline: Swiss Water reports AGM voting results on May 22, 2025 - TSX: SWP. Decaf coffee company announces shareholder decisions.

news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, on May 23, 2025, Michelin recognized the city's culinary prowess at the fourth MICHELIN Guide Ceremony hosted at Address Sky View. The event showcased a total of 119 establishments spanning across 35 diverse cuisine types that secured a spot in the prestigious selection for the year. This highlighted the remarkable growth of Dubai's gastronomic landscape.
news.headline: In Dubai, two restaurants receive three MICHELIN stars for the first time among 119 establishments in the 2025 guide.

news.summary: In Monett, Missouri, on May 22, 2025, Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. revealed that they are scheduled to take part in an upcoming conference. Greg Adelson, the President & CEO, is set to present at Bernstein's 41st Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on May 28th. The company's stock is listed as Nasdaq: JKHY, and this event marks a significant opportunity for them to showcase their strategies and engage with industry leaders.
news.headline: CEO Greg Adelson of Jack Henry & Associates will present at Bernstein's 41st Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on May 28th.

news.summary: Bunker Hill Mining Corp announces amendment to Promissory Note with Teck Resources Limited, increasing the maximum principal amount from US$3.4 million to US$4.4 million. The Promissory Note bears a 12% annual interest rate, with interest being added to the principal monthly. It is available in multiple advances and payable in cash on demand from Teck. The note serves as short-term funding until private placements close, with no bonus securities issued to Teck or conversion into company securities.
news.headline: Bunker Hill Mining Corp increases promissory note amount from US$3.4M to US$4.4M. Teck Resources Limited involved. Interest rate of 12% annually.

news.summary: Mullen Group Ltd. announced on May 22, 2025, the pricing of approximately CAD$400.0 million in senior secured notes through a private placement. The notes will be guaranteed by the Corporation's subsidiaries, MT Investments Inc. and MGL Holding Co. Ltd., and secured by a first ranking charge on all current and future assets of the Corporation and each Guarantor. These notes will have equal priority with Mullen Group's existing senior secured notes due July 2034 and its revised bank credit facilities, as detailed in the press release from July 10, 2024.
news.headline: Mullen Group priced CAD$400.0 million senior secured notes offering, guaranteed by subsidiaries, securing first ranking charge.

news.summary: Marwest Apartment Real Estate Investment Trust (TSXV: MAR) reported financial results for Q1 2025, with a 3.73% increase in Same Property Revenue from Investment Properties over Q1 2024 and a 4.79% increase in average rental rates per suite. The NAV per unit was $2.39 at March 31, 2025. The occupancy rate was 98.14% in Q1 2025 compared to 99.01% in Q1 2024. The REIT owns 4 properties with 516 suites, with an average rental rate of $1,727. Debt-to-Gross Book Value ratio was 67.51% at March 31, 2025. Net Operating Income for Q1 2025 was $1,623,418. Full story available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Marwest Apartment REIT reports Q1 2025: Same Property Revenue up 3.73%, NAV $2.39, Average occupancy 98.14%.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 6.5%. This marks a significant rise from the previous rate of 5.3%. The number of jobless individuals now stands at 2.5 million, up by 400,000 from last year. Moreover, the labor force participation rate has dropped to 62.4%, down from 64.2% in the previous quarter. These figures indicate a challenging economic landscape and highlight the need for effective measures to address the issue of rising unemployment.
news.headline: Vortex Energy Corp. completes Listed Issuer Financing Exemption (LIFE) private placement.

news.summary: Renowned investor Bill Ackman's hedge fund, Pershing Square Capital Management, recently entered a fresh investment in Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) following a significant decline of over 30% in the stock earlier in the year. During a call with analysts, chief investment officer Ryan Israel revealed that the firm purchased Amazon shares at a highly appealing price, as reported by Bloomberg. The move comes amidst a volatile market, with Ackman seizing the opportunity to add this new position to his fund's portfolio. Furthermore, the full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com for more in-depth coverage of the story.
news.headline: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square buys stake in Amazon at "extremely attractive" price after stock drop of >30%.

news.summary: In response to recent events, the government has announced a new funding initiative aimed at supporting small businesses. The initiative will allocate $2 million in grants to help these businesses navigate the economic challenges brought on by the current situation. Small businesses will be able to apply for grants of up to $10,000 to assist with expenses such as rent, payroll, and utilities. The government hopes that this initiative will provide much-needed relief to small businesses that have been impacted by the ongoing crisis. Interested businesses are encouraged to apply as soon as possible to access these funds.
news.headline: Exploring Trump's tax cuts in his significant bill; details on changes and impacts.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Laurel, Maryland, The Coastal Companies announced a voluntary recall of 17 items. These products, manufactured using cucumbers from Bedner Growers, Inc. and supplied by Fresh Start Produce Sales, Inc., are being recalled due to possible Salmonella contamination. The affected items were distributed by East Coast Fresh in Laurel, MD, and Hearn Kirkwood in Jessup, MD.
news.headline: Coastal Companies recalls 17 products made with Fresh Start cucumbers due to Salmonella risk, distributed in MD.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% this year, a significant increase from last year's growth rate of 3.2%. The United States is expected to see an economic growth of 6.5%, while China's economy is predicted to expand by 8.5%. These growth projections are driven by increased vaccination rates, government stimulus packages, and a rebound in consumer spending. However, concerns remain about inflation and supply chain disruptions affecting the pace of recovery. Central banks are closely monitoring these developments to ensure economic stability.
news.headline: Summary: Learn the details of Trump's tax cuts in his significant bill. Find out what's included in this legislation.

news.summary: Today, Prairie Provident Resources Inc. (TSX:PPR) disclosed the outcome of its annual and special shareholders' gathering in Calgary, Alberta, on May 22, 2025. With 1,216,965,050 common shares present, equivalent to about 86.8% of the total common shares in circulation, the meeting saw significant shareholder participation.
news.headline: Prairie Provident reports voting results from its AGM, with 1.2B shares represented, about 86.8% of total outstanding shares.

news.summary: 237 warehouse employees employed by United Natural Foods Inc. in Pompano Beach and Miami have recently decided to join Teamsters Local 769. The workers made this decision through a majority vote and are now preparing to bargain for their very first contract. This comes as a significant development for the labor force in the region and reflects a growing trend in unionization efforts within the industry.
news.headline: 237 UNFI warehouse workers in Pompano Beach and Miami join Teamsters Local 769, gearing up for contract negotiations.

news.summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is currently experiencing significant changes in leadership during President Trump's administration. This comes at a crucial time as the agency considers the possibility of introducing regulations concerning cryptocurrencies.
news.headline: CFTC faces leadership shakeup under Trump as perps may trade crypto in US; Commissioners exit amid regulation debate.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, marking a significant decrease from the previous quarter. The economy also saw an increase of 250,000 new jobs created last month, exceeding analyst expectations. Additionally, the GDP growth for the same period reached 3.5%, reflecting positive economic development. Experts believe these figures indicate a strong and growing economy, providing optimism for the future.
news.headline: Knicks had a major collapse due to turnovers. Last time it was this bad, WNBA didn't exist yet.

news.summary: Denver-based Royal Gold has announced its participation in the Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series on June 4, 2025. Royal Gold, a leading company in the precious metals sector, is set to engage in this event to showcase its operations and financial performance. This virtual roadshow presents a valuable opportunity for Royal Gold to connect with investors and industry stakeholders, with a focus on discussing its strategies and future prospects. The event is scheduled to take place on June 4th and is expected to draw significant attention from the investment community.
news.headline: Royal Gold will be part of Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series on June 4, 2025.

news.summary: In Las Vegas on May 22, 2025, the company BOXABL made an announcement regarding their financial strategy. They have chosen to incorporate a Bitcoin treasury reserve plan, where a portion of their assets will be allocated towards purchasing Bitcoin. By holding cash reserves in US dollars, the company's treasury assets are restricted in their diversification opportunities, potentially leading to devaluation.
news.headline: Home manufacturer BOXABL in Las Vegas has adopted Bitcoin treasury reserve strategy, acquiring a percentage of assets in Bitcoin, diversifying from USD.
Bitwise states Trump entering crypto beneficial for industry growth.

news.summary: In Mississauga, Ontario, MedX Health Corp. ("MedX" or the "Company") (TSX-V: MDX) has successfully completed a further Closing of its Non-brokered Private Placement for accredited investors. This follows the Initial Closing announced on April 7, 2025. The recent Closing involved the issuance of 7,300,000 Units and generated $511,000 in cash proceeds. This additional funding contributes to the total raised from the placement, which was announced on February 25, 2025.
news.headline: MedX completed further closing of Non-brokered Private Placement, issuing 7.3M Units and raising $511,000.

news.summary: After experiencing a slight rebound on Thursday, the stock market returned to a downward trend, with notable increases for Palantir and Tesla. In a significant move, the Supreme Court protected the Federal Reserve from interference by former President Trump. Dow Jones futures are showing a rise following the market's failed attempt at recovery.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures rise after market bounce fails, Supreme Court protects Federal Reserve from Trump.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 22, 2025, Imperial Metals Corporation (TSX:III) has released findings from the Mount Polley 2025 exploration program. The results include a significant section of 152.5 meters, showing a grade of 0.46% copper and 0.97 g/t gold. This begins at a depth of 282.5 meters and encompasses 85.0 meters with a grade of 0.67% copper and 1.56 g/t gold, commencing at 285.0 meters in the C2 Zone diamond drill hole C2-25-121.
news.headline: Drilling at Mount Polley finds 152.5m at 0.46% copper, 0.97g/t gold; incl. 85m at 0.67% copper, 1.56g/t gold.
UBS GLOBAL WEALTH MANAGEMENT RAISES YEAR-END S&P 500 PRICE TARGET TO 6,000, INITIATES JUNE 2026 TARGET OF 6,400

news.summary: On May 20, 2025, a Maryland judge ruled in favor of Silver Star confirming a legal victory related to its 2024 consent solicitation process. The ruling stated that there were no violations of Maryland law or bad faith by Silver Star or its Executive Committee. This decision validates the company's actions and highlights the integrity of its procedures. Allen Hartman's conduct was also mentioned in the case, showcasing the thorough examination conducted by the court. Overall, the ruling provides a significant affirmation for Silver Star and its operations.
news.headline: Silver Star Properties wins legal victory in Maryland confirming 2024 consent process; no violation or bad faith found.
